title: Chouchou Refuses to Abandon the Shop
description: On pages 20–20, Chouchou’s loyalty to the pet food shop turns Buggy’s occupation from a pirate threat into a personal wound for the town.
scene: Chouchou refuses to give up the place connected to his owner, while pirates and bystanders react to the dog’s stubborn defense.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: I see... a pet food store.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: HAVE A SNACK, BUT BE QUICK ABOUT IT.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: He knocked me through that house and into the street behind it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: BUT AT LEAST I'M OUT OF THAT CAGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: OKAY, NOW I'LL SHOW ALL OF THESE CLOWNS...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...AND MAKE THAT THIEF, NAMI, OUR NAVIGATOR!

summary: This part makes the conflict emotional: Luffy sees that Buggy’s violence is not abstract, but aimed at things people love and protect.
